scoring-export-sql.source:
-- Standalone scorecard SQL generated by Cardre.

WITH woe_cte AS (
    SELECT
        *,
    CASE
        WHEN credit_amount IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN credit_amount <= 1387.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1387.5 AND credit_amount <= 1525.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 1525.0 AND credit_amount <= 1712.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 1712.5 AND credit_amount <= 1800.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 1800.0 AND credit_amount <= 1887.5 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 1887.5 AND credit_amount <= 2125.0 THEN -2.044756
        WHEN credit_amount > 2125.0 AND credit_amount <= 2275.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2275.0 AND credit_amount <= 2400.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2400.0 AND credit_amount <= 2537.5 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN credit_amount > 2537.5 AND credit_amount <= 2675.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 2675.0 AND credit_amount <= 2812.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 2812.5 AND credit_amount <= 2900.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 2900.0 AND credit_amount <= 2987.5 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN credit_amount > 2987.5 AND credit_amount <= 3075.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 3075.0 AND credit_amount <= 3162.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 3162.5 AND credit_amount <= 3300.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 3300.0 AND credit_amount <= 3425.0 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN credit_amount > 3425.0 AND credit_amount <= 3600.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN credit_amount > 3600.0 AND credit_amount <= 3812.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN credit_amount > 3812.5 THEN -0.693147
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_credit_amount,
    CASE
        WHEN age_years IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN age_years <= 26.75 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN age_years > 26.75 AND age_years <= 29.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN age_years > 29.0 AND age_years <= 31.25 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN age_years > 31.25 AND age_years <= 32.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 32.0 AND age_years <= 33.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 33.0 AND age_years <= 34.5 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN age_years > 34.5 AND age_years <= 35.25 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 35.25 AND age_years <= 36.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 36.0 AND age_years <= 37.75 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN age_years > 37.75 AND age_years <= 39.0 THEN 1.510592
        WHEN age_years > 39.0 AND age_years <= 40.25 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN age_years > 40.25 AND age_years <= 41.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 41.0 AND age_years <= 42.0 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 42.0 AND age_years <= 43.5 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN age_years > 43.5 AND age_years <= 46.0 THEN -1.386294
        WHEN age_years > 46.0 AND age_years <= 48.0 THEN 0.663294
        WHEN age_years > 48.0 AND age_years <= 49.75 THEN -1.53393
        WHEN age_years > 49.75 AND age_years <= 51.5 THEN 1.17412
        WHEN age_years > 51.5 AND age_years <= 52.25 THEN -2.044756
        WHEN age_years > 52.25 THEN 1.17412
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_age_years,
    CASE
        WHEN duration_months IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN duration_months <= 7.75 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 7.75 AND duration_months <= 9.0 THEN -1.386294
        WHEN duration_months > 9.0 AND duration_months <= 10.25 THEN 0.646627
        WHEN duration_months > 10.25 AND duration_months <= 12.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 12.0 AND duration_months <= 13.0 THEN 1.157453
        WHEN duration_months > 13.0 AND duration_months <= 14.0 THEN 1.157453
        WHEN duration_months > 14.0 AND duration_months <= 16.0 THEN 1.157453
        WHEN duration_months > 16.0 AND duration_months <= 17.0 THEN 1.157453
        WHEN duration_months > 17.0 AND duration_months <= 20.5 THEN 1.157453
        WHEN duration_months > 20.5 AND duration_months <= 21.25 THEN -2.061423
        WHEN duration_months > 21.25 AND duration_months <= 23.0 THEN 1.493925
        WHEN duration_months > 23.0 AND duration_months <= 26.5 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 26.5 AND duration_months <= 27.5 THEN -2.061423
        WHEN duration_months > 27.5 AND duration_months <= 30.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 30.0 AND duration_months <= 32.5 THEN 0.646627
        WHEN duration_months > 32.5 AND duration_months <= 35.0 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 35.0 AND duration_months <= 37.25 THEN -0.693147
        WHEN duration_months > 37.25 THEN 1.157453
        ELSE NULL
    END AS woe_duration_months
    FROM input_data
)
SELECT
    *,
    487.122876 + (-1.0 * 28.853901 * (-1.824649 + -1.017294 * woe_credit_amount + -1.284976 * woe_age_years + -1.282511 * woe_duration_months)) AS score
FROM woe_cte
